oai_dc:dc.dc:title: Growth: The lifeblood of a practice
oai_dc:dc.dc:creator: Traas, Tonia Kay
oai_dc:dc.dc:subject: growth
veterinary practice ownership/start-up
sustainability
oai_dc:dc.dc:description: My goal in this presentation is to share my story of my veteri­nary career thus far and pass on the things that I believe have attributed to practice growth, success and sustainability of my start-up mobile large animal veterinary practice in rural Amer­ica. I will share the “6 essentials for growth” in this presenta­tion in the hopes that some or all of them will resonate with other veterinarians (practice owners or associates) and provide some actionable ways to add value to your practice. In summa­ry, the 6 essentials for growth are: location, team, network, per­sonality, mindset and trust. I will delve into each of these along with share some personal anecdotes in the presentation.
oai_dc:dc.dc:source: American Association of Bovine Practitioners Conference Proceedings; Vol. 58 No. 2 (2025): 2025 AABP Annual Conference Proceedings; 164-166
oai_dc:dc.dc:rights: Copyright (c) 2026 American Association of Bovine Practitioners
